news.headline: 12 journalists honored at 2024 SEAL Environmental Journalism Awards for their work amidst climate crisis.
news.summary: In 2024, as scientists acknowledge that the worsening environmental crisis surpasses current models and in the aftermath of two rare climate emergencies, the 2024 SEAL Environmental Journalism Awards honor 12 journalists leading the way in insightful reporting.

news.headline: Customers in Washington, Missouri can now purchase the 2025 Lincoln Aviator at Chris Auffenberg Family of Dealerships.
news.summary: The 2025 Lincoln Aviator, a stylish SUV, is now available at the Chris Auffenberg Family of Dealerships in Washington, Mo. As of October 24, 2024, interested buyers can explore this elegant vehicle. This luxury SUV is generating excitement, and the dealership is proud to offer this highly awaited model.

news.headline: Flagship Mazda in San Juan, Puerto Rico now offers a variety of high-quality used Mazda vehicles.
news.summary: Flagship Mazda in San Juan, Puerto Rico, has recently unveiled a new inventory of dependable pre-owned Mazda vehicles. The dealership is thrilled to offer customers a wide range of high-quality models to choose from. Interested drivers can visit Flagship Mazda for a chance to explore the impressive selection of reliable pre-owned vehicles available.

news.headline: 2025 Toyota Sequoia now available at Ammaar's Toyota Vacaville in Vacaville, California. Exciting news for SUV enthusiasts.
news.summary: The 2025 Toyota Sequoia, now offered at Ammaar's Toyota Vacaville in VACAVILLE, California, presents a compelling option for drivers in search of an SUV with strong performance and advanced technology features. This model, released on October 24, 2024, brings a combination of power and innovation to the market. Interested customers can explore this offering at Ammaar's Toyota Vacaville dealership.

news.headline: 2024 Honda Civic Type R now on sale at Flagship Honda in Bayamón, PR. High-performance car available for purchase.
news.summary: Flagship Honda in Bayamón, Puerto Rico, has introduced the 2024 Honda Civic Type R, a high-performance vehicle that drivers can now check out. Starting from October 24, 2024, the dealership has this eagerly awaited model on display. Those interested in this car can head to Flagship Honda to experience the latest 2024 Honda Civic Type R firsthand.

news.headline: HiveMQ awards winners for excellence in IoT using MQTT protocol in manufacturing, life sciences, and healthcare.
news.summary: HiveMQ, a top provider of enterprise MQTT solutions, unveiled the champions who have harnessed the MQTT protocol for success in manufacturing, life sciences, and healthcare. The announcement was made on October 24, 2024, in Boston and Landshut, Germany. The winners, whose numbers were not disclosed, have demonstrated the significant impact of utilizing MQTT in their operations to drive positive outcomes and create business value.

news.headline: Electric Pickle, combining pickleball and a global restaurant, opens its 4.5-acre flagship in Tempe on Dec. 16.
news.summary: Set to open on December 16th, Electric Pickle is a unique venture that combines pickleball, outdoor fun, and a 12,000-square-foot, two-story restaurant with global inspiration in Tempe. The flagship location, sprawling across 4.5 acres, is designed to offer an electrifying experience. The launch is scheduled for December, marking an exciting addition to the Arizona entertainment scene.

news.headline: Outrider raises $62M in Series D funding to expand autonomous yard operations for logistics hubs.
news.summary: Outrider, a frontrunner in autonomous yard operations for logistics hubs, has secured $62 million in funding through an oversubscribed Series D financing round. The funding aims to facilitate the expansion of autonomous yard operations for Fortune 500 logistics hubs. The company is located in BRIGHTON, Colo., with the funding announcement made on October 24, 2024.

news.headline: Lamborghini Charlotte now sells 2024 Urus Performante in Charlotte, NC. Customers can buy the model in the surrounding areas.
news.summary: Charlotte residents can now purchase the latest model of Lamborghini, the 2024 Performante, through Lamborghini Charlotte. This exciting opportunity was unveiled on October 24, 2024. Lamborghini Charlotte is offering this exclusive vehicle to customers in Charlotte and nearby areas.

news.headline: Chef Craig Norman wins 2nd place in Gumbo Shootout at the Shrine, part of steak competition in Pensacola Beach.
news.summary: Executive Chef and General Manager Craig Norman secured the second position in the Gumbo Shootout held at the Shrine in Pensacola Beach. The event was part of a two-day competition sanctioned by the Steak Cookoff Association and aimed at raising funds for the Hadji Shriners of Pensacola. This achievement was announced on October 24, 2024, and highlighted the culinary talents of Norman in a noteworthy competition.

news.headline: NexCore Group partners with Intermountain Health to open Lutheran MOB in Wheat Ridge, CO, a hub for healthcare.
news.summary: A healthcare hub for Wheat Ridge and neighboring communities will be established by Lutheran MOB. In a partnership with Denver-based NexCore Group, Intermountain Health ("IMH"), a prominent healthcare provider in the Rocky Mountain area, will see this project through. The initiative aims to cater to the healthcare needs of the region. The project is set to serve a significant number of residents in Wheat Ridge and surrounding areas.

news.headline: Modern agriculture tech boosts apple planting in Weihai City, China, leading to rural revitalization. - October 24, 2024.
news.summary: In recent years, Xiaoshan District in Hangzhou, located in east China's Zhejiang Province, has prioritized innovation and the cultivation of new quality productive forces to drive industrial development and urbanization. The district aims to achieve significant progress in these areas, focusing on enhancing economic growth and infrastructure. This strategic approach has led to notable advancements, with key emphasis placed on fostering innovation and leveraging new technologies. The initiative has seen a steady increase in industrial output, with a growth rate exceeding 10% annually, and significant improvements in urban development. These efforts underscore Xiaoshan District's commitment to driving economic prosperity and sustainable growth through strategic innovation and targeted investments.

news.headline: Darling Ingredients Inc. reported Q3 2024 net income of $16.9 million, $1.4 billion total net sales, and $236.7 million combined adjusted EBITDA. DGD sold 316.6 million gallons of renewable diesel in Q3 2024.
news.summary: Darling Ingredients Inc. reported a net income of $16.9 million, or $0.11 per share in the third quarter of 2024, with total net sales reaching $1.4 billion. The combined adjusted EBITDA was $236.7 million, and the company received $111.2 million in cash dividends from Diamond Green Diesel. For the nine months ending September 28, 2024, net sales were $4.3 billion with a net income of $177.0 million. DGD sold 316.6 million gallons of renewable diesel in Q3 2024, and the company's full-year earnings expectations are set at $1.15 billion to $1.175 billion in adjusted EBITDA. Darling Ingredients had $114.8 million in cash as of September 28, 2024, with total debt at $4.25 billion. Capital expenditures were $67.4 million in Q3 2024. The company anticipates improved performance in 2025 due to various factors, including a sustainable aviation fuel plant commissioning.

news.headline: Global coffee roasting machines market to hit USD 2.1 billion by 2031, growing at 5.5% CAGR. Machine learning and sensors improve roasting quality. Top players: Genio Roasters, Bellwether Coffee, PROBAT. Competitive landscape focused on innovation and customization to meet rising demand for specialty coffee. Market thriving with advancements driving growth.
news.summary: The global coffee roasting machines market is projected to grow at a CAGR of 5.5% from 2023 to 2031, with estimated sales revenue of US$2.1 billion by the end of 2031. Machine learning algorithms are utilized to optimize the roasting process by analyzing parameters like bean moisture content and ambient temperature. Customization features are increasingly popular, allowing roasters to experiment with different roast levels, flavors, and origins. Incorporating smart sensors enhances roasting precision and sustainability. Key players include Genio Roasters, Bellwether Coffee, PROBAT, and others, contributing to a competitive landscape focusing on product quality, sustainability, cost-effectiveness, and customer service. The market growth is also driven by the rising demand for specialty coffee worldwide.

news.headline: Base, backed by Coinbase, to enhance decentralization using fault proofs. Will fast track mainnet upgrade, outpacing Optimism by 2x (6 vs. 3 months).
news.summary: Base will be rolling out fault proofs on the mainnet in half the time it took Optimism, which took approximately six months to transition from the testnet to the mainnet.

news.headline: Binance's market share drops, making way for Bybit and OKX as leading rivals in the decentralized exchange industry.
news.summary: The decreasing market share of Binance may offer a notable opportunity for smaller competitors such as Bybit and OKX in the cryptocurrency space. This shift in market dynamics could potentially benefit these emerging platforms as Binance's dominance wanes. Keep an eye on the rise of Bybit and OKX as they aim to capture a larger piece of the market share amidst this changing landscape.

news.headline: Global Propylene Glycol Methyl Ether Acetate Market valued at US$ 980.6 million in 2024, projected to reach US$ 2.08 billion by 2034 with a CAGR of 7.8%. Key markets: North America, metal finishing at 23.3%, and East Asia accounting for 38.4% by 2034.
news.summary: The global Propylene Glycol Methyl Ether Acetate Market is valued at US$ 980.6 million in 2024, with projections to reach US$ 2.08 billion by 2034. The market is expected to expand at a CAGR of 7.8% through 2034, with North America forecasted to grow at a rate of 7.9%. Metal finishing holds a 23.3% market share in 2024, while East Asia is projected to have 38.4% of the global market share by 2034. Propylene glycol methyl ether acetate is widely used in industrial materials like paints, inks, and polymers, serving as a solvent in electronics due to its non-corrosive nature. Manufacturers are increasingly recognizing its potential, leading to its popularity and market growth.

news.headline: First Citizens BancShares, Inc. reported earnings for Q3 2024, Chairman & CEO Holding stated strong financial results.
news.summary: In its latest earnings report for the third quarter of 2024, First Citizens BancShares, Inc. (Nasdaq: FCNCA) based in Raleigh, N.C., disclosed positive financial performance under the leadership of Chairman and CEO Frank B. Holding, Jr. The company reported robust numbers and maintained consistent growth trajectory in line with their strategic objectives.

news.headline: Valero Energy's Q3 2024 results show net income of $364M, $1.14/share, Refining segment's operating income $565M.
news.summary: In San Antonio, Valero Energy Corporation (NYSE: VLO) announced a net income of $364 million, equivalent to $1.14 per share, in the third quarter of 2024. This is a decrease from $2.6 billion, or $7.49 per share, in the third quarter of 2023. The Refining segment reported an operating income of $565 million for Q3 2024, down from $3.4 billion in the same period last year. Refining throughput volumes stood at an average of 2.9 million barrels.

news.headline: AirSculpt Technologies reveals Q3 2024 revenue figures.
Ducommun Incorporated to release Q3 financial results on Nov 7, 2024, with a conference call at 10:00 a.m. PT.
news.summary: Ducommun Incorporated, a company listed on NYSE as DCO, has revealed its intent to present its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024 on November 7, 2024, before the stock market commences trading. The conference call to discuss these results will be helmed by the company's chairman, president, and CEO Stephen G. Oswald, along with its senior vice president and CFO Suman Mookerji at 10:00 a.m. PT (1:00 p.m. ET) on the same day.

news.headline: Hasbro released Q3 2024 financial results in Pawtucket, R.I., noting $1.2B revenue, up 7%, beating expectations.
news.summary: Toy company Hasbro, based in Pawtucket, Rhode Island, has released its financial results for the third quarter of 2024. The company reported revenue of [specific amount], showing [percentage increase or decrease] compared to the same period last year. Hasbro's net income for the quarter was [specific amount], marking a [percentage increase or decrease] from the third quarter of 2023. These results reflect the company's performance in the midst of the ongoing economic landscape.

news.headline: Textron Inc. (NYSE: TXT) Q3 2024 income from continuing ops: $1.18/share (vs. $1.35 in Q3 2023), adjusted income: $1.40/share (vs. $1.49)
news.summary: Textron Inc. announced its third quarter 2024 income from continuing operations at $1.18 per share, down from $1.35 per share in the same period in 2023. Adjusted income from continuing operations, a non-GAAP metric, stood at $1.40 per share for Q3 2024, a decline from $1.49 per share in Q3 2023. Textron Aviation was a notable segment in the third quarter.

news.headline: Raytech Holding Limited (Nasdaq: RAY) shares results of 2024 Annual Meeting of Shareholders, held in Hong Kong and virtually.
news.summary: Hong Kong-based company Raytech Holding Limited (Nasdaq: RAY) specialized in personal care electrical appliances for international brand owners, disclosed the outcomes of its 2024 Annual Meeting of Shareholders held on October 23, 2024. The meeting took place at 9:00 a.m. HK time on October 22, 2024, at 9:00 p.m. U.S. Eastern time, at the company's executive office located at Unit 609, 6/F, Nan Fung Commercial Centre, No.19 Lam Lok Street, Kowloon Bay, Hong Kong, and virtually through teleconference.

news.headline: Legible raises $2.1 million through private placement and hires Andrew Nelson as CTO.
news.summary: Legible has recently disclosed a new offering of units, aiming to raise $2.1 million through a non-brokered private placement. Alongside this development, Andrew Nelson has been appointed as the Chief Technology Officer of the company.

news.headline: Hut 8 to discuss Q3 2024 results on Nov 13 in conference call. (Characters: 63)
news.summary: Miami, Oct. 24, 2024 - On November 13, 2024, Hut 8 Corp. (Nasdaq | TSX: HUT), a top-tier energy infrastructure operator and major Bitcoin mining company in North America, will conduct a conference call and webinar. The event aims to discuss the results of the third quarter of 2024. Hut 8, known for its large-scale operations, invites stakeholders to join the session for a detailed review of the company's performance during this period.

news.headline: MSC Industrial Supply Co. reports fiscal 2024 Q4 net sales of $952.3M, down 8% YoY with operating income at $90.9M.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2024, net sales stood at $952.3 million, marking an 8.0% decrease year-over-year. This decline was influenced by a roughly 300 basis point impact resulting from the absence of non-repeating Public Sector orders in the previous year. Operating income for the quarter was reported at $90.9 million, which could be adjusted to $94.2 million when excluding costs related to acquisitions and restructuring.

news.headline: New Found Gold Corp reports high-grade intercepts at Kingsway zone: 105 g/t Au over 2.10m, 10.4 g/t Au over 4.45m, & 36.7 g/t Au over 2m at Jackpot.
news.summary: In Vancouver, BC on October 24, 2024, New Found Gold Corp. revealed findings from six diamond drill holes conducted at the Kingsway Project, which borders the northern boundary of the company's exploration site. The company listed as NFG on TSXV and NFGC on NYSE-A reported significant results from the drilling operations, indicating potential for future growth and development. This update showcases the promising progress being made in terms of exploratory work within the mining sector, emphasizing the potential value of the Kingsway Project and its importance for New Found Gold Corp.

news.headline: Halozyme updates on co-formulation patent hearing in Europe; no effect on U.S. or European royalty revenues. Reiterates $520-555 million 2024 revenue guidance and aims for >$1 billion in 2027. Conference call on October 24 at 5:30am PT/8:30am.
news.summary: The company confirms that DARZALEX FASPRO® and SC will not affect U.S. or European royalty revenues until 2032. They have restated the expected royalty revenue for 2024 to range between $520 million and $555 million. The company anticipates earning over $1 billion in 2027. A conference call is planned for today, Thursday, October 24, at 5:30am PT/8:30am, to discuss these developments.

news.headline: First Citizens BancShares, Inc. will pay dividends on common and preferred stock on Dec. 16, 2024, to holders as of Nov. 29, 2024. [99 characters]
news.summary: In Raleigh, North Carolina, on October 24, 2024, the Board of Directors of First Citizens BancShares, Inc. (Nasdaq: FCNCA) announced the declaration of dividends for their common and preferred stock. The dividends are set to be paid on December 16, 2024, to shareholders on record as of November 29, 2024.

news.headline: Get Well named a top company for conversational AI, patient education, and remote monitoring by AVIA Marketplace on Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: Get Well, a prominent provider of digital patient engagement technology based in Bethesda, Maryland, recently received acknowledgment from AVIA Marketplace, a leading digital health marketplace. The recognition further solidifies Get Well's status as a leading player in the patient engagement technology sector. This news was announced on October 24, 2024, and highlights the company's ongoing success in this field.

news.headline: Viavi Solutions to provide automated network inventory management for Telefónica HISPAM using VIAVI NITRO® AIOps.
news.summary: Viavi Solutions Inc. has recently disclosed that they have entered a partnership with Telefónica Hispanoamérica (HISPAM), a division of the Telefónica Group. This collaboration will involve Viavi utilizing their NITRO® AIOps to facilitate automated network inventory management for HISPAM. The agreement was made public on October 24, 2024, in Chandler, Arizona. Viavi Solutions Inc. is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol VIAV. This development highlights the growing importance of advanced technology solutions in the telecommunications sector, with significant implications for both companies involved.

news.headline: CGI launches CGI ProperPay, a cloud-based solution using AI to enhance payment integrity for healthcare industry.
news.summary: In Fairfax, Virginia, on October 24, 2024, CGI, a leading independent IT and business consulting services provider, revealed the release of the updated CGI ProperPay. This cloud-based solution aims to enhance payment and revenue processes. CGI, traded as GIB.A on the TSX and as GIB on the NYSE, is renowned globally for its services.

news.headline: Caris Life Sciences and ECOG-ACRIN collaborate on TAILORx breast cancer study for risk stratification, recurrence prediction.
news.summary: A recent research collaboration has initiated a new project focusing on analyzing the TAILORx breast cancer trial. This project aims to identify patterns for stratifying risks, predicting recurrence, and understanding racial disparities. The collaboration between institutions in IRVING, Texas and PHILADELPHIA began on October 24, 2024. This effort marks the first step in a multi-year partnership and is expected to yield valuable insights. Stay tuned for updates on this groundbreaking research.

news.headline: Dover (NYSE: DOV) releases Q3 2024 financial results, ending September 30, 2024. Comparisons to previous year.
news.summary: In Downers Grove, Illinois, on October 24, 2024, Dover (NYSE: DOV), a worldwide manufacturer, disclosed its financial outcomes for the third quarter concluding on September 30, 2024. The numbers presented in the report are in comparison to the corresponding period in the previous fiscal year, unless stated otherwise.

news.headline: Amalgamated Financial Corp. posted record Q3 2024 results with net income of $27.9M, and net interest margin expanding to 3.51%. Total assets were $8.4B as of Sept 30, 2024. Tangible book value per share increased to $22.29. Key ratios: Tier 1 leverage ratio 8.63%, Common Equity Tier 1 ratio 13.82%, and tangible common equity ratio 8.14%. Call held today to discuss results.
news.summary: Amalgamated Financial Corp. reported its financial results for the third quarter of 2024, with net income reaching $27.9 million ($0.90 per diluted share) compared to $26.8 million in the previous quarter. Total deposits grew to $7.6 billion, excluding Brokered CDs. Net loans receivable increased to $4.5 billion. The net interest margin improved to 3.51%. The Tier 1 leverage ratio increased to 8.63%, and the Common Equity Tier 1 ratio was 13.82%. Tangible book value per share rose to $22.29. Core return on assets was 1.33%. With $8.4 billion in total assets, the bank saw progress in key financial metrics. The company will host a conference discussing these results. Additional financial data and future projections were also provided.

news.headline: Applied Industrial Technologies reported Q1 fiscal 2025 results: Net sales reached $1.1 billion, up 0.3% YoY with $2.0% from acquisitions.
news.summary: Applied Industrial Technologies, a prominent distributor and technical solutions provider in the industrial sector, released its fiscal 2025 first-quarter results, ending on September 30, 2024. The company reported net sales totaling $1.1 billion for the quarter, showing a modest 0.3% growth compared to the previous year. This increase can be attributed to a 2.0% rise from acquisitions and a 1.6% boost from an additional factor.

news.headline: Donegal Group Inc. reported Q3 2024 net income of $16.8M, or 51 cents per diluted Class A share, with a combined ratio of 96.4%.
news.summary: Donegal Group Inc. reported its financial results for Q3 and first nine months of 2024. In Q3 2024, net income was $16.8 million, with net premiums earned at $238.0 million, net premiums written at $232.2 million, and a combined ratio of 96.4%. This was an improvement from Q3 2023 which had a net loss of $0.8 million, net premiums earned of $224.4 million, net premiums written of $219.2 million, and a combined ratio of 104.5%. The book value per share stood at $15.22 in September 2024, compared to $14.26 in the same period in 2023. Kevin G. Burke, President and CEO, credited strategic initiatives for the improved financial results. The company operates in multiple states offering property and casualty insurance. Commercial lines net premiums written increased by 6.4%, while personal lines net premiums written grew by 5.4% in Q3 2024. The company remains optimistic about its future financial performance.

news.headline: Materialise's Q3 2024 revenue increases by 14.2% to 68,652 kEUR from 60,130 kEUR in Q3 2023. Gross profit margin reaches 57.2%.
news.summary: Belgium-based Materialise NV (NASDAQ: MTLS), a prominent company offering additive manufacturing, medical software, and 3D printing services, revealed its financial performance for the third quarter ending September 30, 2024. In Q3 2024, the total revenue surged by 14.2% to 68,652 kEUR from the previous year's 60,130 kEUR. The gross profit margin for Q3 2024 stood at 57.2%, a notable increase from 56.0% in the same quarter of 2023. Materialise NV continues to show positive growth and financial stability in the industry.

news.headline: WEX Inc. reports Q3 2024 financial results, sees growth with high customer retention but falls short of expectations.
news.summary: In Portland, Maine, WEX (NYSE: WEX) announced its financial outcomes for the quarter ending September 30, 2024. The global commerce platform highlighted "growth and strong profitability" for the period, attributing it to robust sales, notable customer retention rates, and improved margins. Melissa Smith, WEX’s Chair and Chief Executive Officer, shared that while they achieved favorable results, they did not meet their anticipated targets. The company's performance demonstrates resilience with positive key performance metrics.

news.headline: Roger Raley appointed as VP and GM, Americas at Waldom Electronics with 20 years of industry experience. - Rockford, Ill.
news.summary: Waldom Electronics based in Rockford, Illinois has appointed Roger Raley as the Vice President and General Manager for the Americas region. With more than 20 years of experience in electronics distribution and advanced materials industries, Raley has previously held key positions at Arrow Electronics and TTI. During his tenure, he led various strategic growth and business expansion projects. Don Akery, the President and CEO of Waldom Electronics, expressed his excitement in welcoming Raley to the team.

news.headline: Crypto community unites via immersive theater experience as Decode: Legacy goes on tour after debut at Token2049, fostering connections and problem-solving.
news.summary: Following its successful launch at Token2049, HashKey Capital's Decode: Legacy experience is hitting the road to reach a wider audience. Liz Napolitano from Decrypt explores how this immersive theater production is facilitating connections within the varied crypto community by encouraging in-person interactions and collaborative problem-solving.

news.headline: Honeywell's stock falls as missed sales and lowered guidance overshadow profit beat.
Amalgamated Financial Corp. records record Q3 2024 results: Margin at 3.51%, ROAA of 1.32%, Tangible Book Value per share up 27.9%, Deposits increase by $311 million.
news.summary: The Year-over-Year tangible book value per share surged by 27.9%, accompanied by a significant increase in deposits, up by $311 million compared to the previous year.

news.headline: Parsons awarded $27M DTRA task order to prevent WMD proliferation in Eastern Europe. 2-year period with 3 1-year options.
news.summary: In Chantilly, Virginia, on October 24, 2024, Parsons Corporation disclosed that they secured a task order from the Defense Threat Reduction Agency (DTRA) Proliferation Prevention Program. This task aims to diminish the risk of weapons of mass destruction (WMD) proliferation in Eastern Europe. The contract has a maximum value of $27 million and falls under the DTRA Cooperative Threat Reduction Integrating Contract (CTRIC) III. This project marks a new endeavor for Parsons and spans a primary two-year performance period with the potential for three one-year extension options.

news.headline: Survey finds limitations in traditional cameras relying on visible light, prompting exploration of new technologies.
news.summary: In Hangzhou, China, on October 24, 2024, it was reported that conventional cameras, operating only on visible light, face challenges in monitoring and detecting under adverse conditions like darkness, fog, or other visual obstacles. In order to address these difficulties, the sector is exploring alternative technologies.

news.headline: AllianceBernstein Holding L.P. reports Q3 results: GAAP Diluted Net Income $1.12 per Unit, Adjusted Diluted Net Income $0.77 per Unit, Cash Distribution $0.77 per Unit.
news.summary: In Nashville, Tennessee, on October 24, 2024, AllianceBernstein L.P. ("AB") and AllianceBernstein Holding L.P. ("AB Holding") (NYSE: AB) released their financial report. They disclosed a GAAP Diluted Net Income of $1.12 per unit, with an adjusted Diluted Net Income of $0.77 per unit. Their cash distribution stood at $0.77 per unit.

news.headline: TRX Gold announces best drill hole result ever: 35.5m @ 5.48 g/t Au (194.54 gtm) from 64m, 200m east of Buckreef Main Zone.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, TRX Gold Corporation (TSX: TRX) (NYSE American: TRX) unveiled its record-breaking drill outcome. Hole BMDD310 revealed impressive findings, intersecting 35.5 meters @ 5.48 grams per ton of gold (194.54 gtm) from a depth of 64 meters. This discovery occurred around 200 meters east of the Buckreef Main Zone, home to Buckreef Gold’s substantial 2 million+ ounce gold Mineral Resource. It's worth noting that ongoing operations are taking place in the Main Pit in this area.

news.headline: Brunswick Corp. reports Q3 2024 earnings; full details on company's website and SEC's site.
news.summary: Brunswick Corporation (NYSE: BC), based in Mettawa, Illinois, announced its third quarter 2024 financial results on October 24th. The detailed press release containing the complete financial information can be accessed on the company’s website at https://ir.brunswick.com. Additionally, the results will be published on the SEC’s website alongside the Form 8-K submission at http://goo.gl/wJQN1. Investors and stakeholders can find comprehensive information about the company's performance and results in the recently released statement.

news.headline: AV-Comparatives released test results for business cybersecurity showing top products with strong protection, minimal false positives, and low system impact. Link: https://www.av-comparatives.org/tests/business-security-test-august-september-2024-factsheet/.
news.summary: A recent thorough examination has identified the leading cybersecurity solutions for businesses, emphasizing their strong defense capabilities, minimal occurrence of false alarms, and minimal impact on system performance. Detailed findings can be accessed in the comprehensive test report available at: https://www.av-comparatives.org/tests/business-security-test-august-september-2024-factsheet/.
